mapper.select: select * from t_bpm_approval_group where approval_group_id = #{approvalGroupId} for update
select * from t_bpm_approval_group where instance_id = #{instanceId} and group_state = 'PENDING' order by approval_group_id for update

select * from t_bpm_approval_group where approval_group_id in
#{approvalGroupId}
select * from t_bpm_approval_group where instance_id = #{instanceId} order by approval_group_id
